command: cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && AUDIT_COUNT=$(ls /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance/sentinel-*.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l) && echo "Audit records: $AUDIT_COUNT" && echo '--- Recent audit records ---' && ls -t /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance/sentinel-*.json 2>/dev/null | head -8 | while read f; do python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('')); print(d.get('record_type','?'), d.get('from_agent','?'), '->', d.get('to_agent','?'), 'blocked:', d.get('blocked', False))" 2>/dev/null || echo $f; done && echo '--- types breakdown ---' && ls /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance/sentinel-*-PASS.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l && echo PASS && ls /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance/sentinel-*-FAIL.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l && echo FAIL
